decisions.description: Checks the Application Status to Display a readOnly version of the screen when the application is ReadOnly
decisions.name: Check_Application_Status
decisions.label: Check Application Status

Flow.description: CC 11/7/25: Added a read-only path for submitted applications v10 fixed issue pulling in the total revenue v8 removed indirect cost and updated datatable v7 fixes to errors within datatable v6 fixing issues with datatable element v5 - NN - prep to delete everything to fix flow v4 Updater error loop v3 fixed missing value v2 added revenue sources
Flow.label: CDBG Budget Flow [Screen Flow]

fields.name: dt_BudgetHome
fields.fieldText:
Proposed Activity Budgets.


Please edit the Planned CDBG Amount, Other Funding, and Narrative sections with Budget information.


﻿Click Save after making changes to the below table and click Update and Save Budget Button to save the budget changes to your application.

value.stringValue: Total_Amount__c:Total Activity Budget, Planned_Amount__c:Planned CDBG Amount, Description__c:Narrative
Total_Amount__c:Total Activity Budget, Planned_Amount__c:Proposed CDBG Amount, Description__c:Narrative
Total_Amount__c:Total Activity Budget, Planned_Amount__c:Planned CDBG Amount, Description__c:Narrative

fields.name: dt_BudgetHome_ReadOnly
fields.fieldText:
Proposed Activity Budgets.


Please edit the Planned CDBG Amount, Other Funding, and Narrative sections with Budget information.


﻿Click Save after making changes to the below table and click Update and Save Budget Button to save the budget changes to your application.

value.stringValue: Total_Amount__c:Total Activity Budget, Planned_Amount__c:Planned CDBG Amount, Description__c:Narrative
Total_Amount__c:Total Activity Budget, Planned_Amount__c:Proposed CDBG Amount, Description__c:Narrative
